response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: Audio dialogue phonetically matches the characters CC and Chichi. The song audio matches the reference lyrics for 'Utauyo!! MIRACLE' precisely. 2. JSON Usage: The reference lyrics were fully utilized for the song portion to ensure accuracy. The conversation in the first half was manually transcribed as it was not included in the reference JSON. 3. Timing & Pacing: Timed dialogue and lyrics strictly to vocal cues. Included prominent visual text for the network logo and song credits. Applied aggressive truncation and instantaneous transitions during the rapid song segments to prevent cascading delays.

subtitles.original: Oh, you're making so much noise!

subtitles.original: みんなが大好きっ！！

subtitles.original: 延々続行 ルララ Miracle Sing Time
subtitles.english: It's our never-ending lu-la-la Miracle Sing Time

subtitles.original: 歌って 歌って 愛伝える最強手段
subtitles.english: I'll sing, I'll sing, it's the absolute best way to express my love!

subtitles.original: つたない曲でも 微妙な歌詞でも
subtitles.english: Even if the composition is clumsy or the lyrics are iffy

subtitles.original: 届けたい 精一杯のsoulを
subtitles.english: I want to convey my soul with all I have!

subtitles.original: Utauyo!! MIRACLE
subtitles.english: [Song: Utauyo!! MIRACLE / Lyrics: Shoko Omori / Music: Tom-H@ck]

subtitles.original: どうしようオートマティックに決められてる
subtitles.english: What can we do, we can't follow this time table

subtitles.original: 時間割じゃ追っつかないの
subtitles.english: That's been decided for us automatically

subtitles.original: 夢無限したいこと怒涛 廊下もダッシュで集まるよ
subtitles.english: Billowing waves of us infinite dreamers dash out and assemble in the hallway

subtitles.original: お行儀悪かったらsorry!でもなりふりも構わずに
subtitles.english: Sorry if my manners are bad! But don't mind how I look

subtitles.original: どっぷりハマっちゃうplayキラリって もしやこれが青春

subtitles.original: ever ever・・・Forever Shine

subtitles.original: ほんとに大好きっ！！
subtitles.english: I really love you!!
